import math

def compute_distances(points_a, points_b):
    results = []
    for pa in points_a:
        for pb in points_b:
            dx = pa.coordinates[0] - pb.coordinates[0]
            dy = pa.coordinates[1] - pb.coordinates[1]
            dist = math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
            results.append(dist)
    return results

def apply_transforms(matrix, vectors):
    output = []
    for v in vectors:
        for i in range(len(v)):
            v[i] = matrix.data[i] * v[i] + matrix.bias[i]
        output.append(v)
    return output
